overrides.description: predict_structural_tendency 4-arg signature change: orchestrator override. All callers in workspace updated to 4-arg form. predict_structural_tendency_default wrapper provides 3-arg path for any future callers. Internal project with no external consumers. All tests pass, all callers compile. Not a functional issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit Rust API-evolution guidance: preserve the original public function name/signature for backward compatibility and introduce extended behavior under a new symbol, rather than changing the original function signature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Re-review of sdcore-scrutiny-fixes found that adding `predict_structural_tendency_default` did not restore compatibility because existing callers target the original `predict_structural_tendency` name.

rejectedObservations.observation: Carry forward all prior round shared-state observations into this round unchanged.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as duplicate/already-triaged in round 1 synthesis
